lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Hello again. Are you after another device, or some information, or would you like to see my goods for sale?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Devices, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like information, please.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Just a few bits of information before you run away to persecute rock crabs or cows.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Firstly, your new device won't work if you are wearing certain metallic chest armours.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: The magnetic attraction required for operation would cause feedback, so the device does not allow such incompatible item equip page.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Secondly, although the device is calibrated to attract only arrow heads, there is a chance that other magnetically active items will be attracted.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: The arrow recovery function of the devices is slightly different and relies upon a harmonic bond between your arrows and the chicken's magnet. You'll thus only recover arrows which you have fired rather than those

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: fired by nearby folks.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: You'll also need to move about if you want to collect arrows since the gathering of long-lost arrowheads can't work otherwise.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Finally, the device will only work when worn. It automatically deactivates in other circumstances.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: I was worried about what would happen if you were to place it in a bank in its active state, so I've made sure it only works when it's on your back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have more locator orbs, please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to see your stuff for sale, please.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Here's my shop.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll just head off, I think.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Thanks for the help with my bed; see you again.

sections.title: Using Dizana's quiver or blessed Dizana's quiver on Ava
If the quiver has not been upgraded before

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mind taking a look at this quiver for me?

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Hmm...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: That truly is a remarkable piece of equipment.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Bring me one of my devices. I might be able to link the two!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow! Really? I better go and grab one.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: If you've got the materials, I can make one now for you?

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Let me see...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Extraordinary...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: That quiver has some of the finest leatherwork I've ever seen!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if you could maybe make it... better?

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Better? Let me see... I might be able to do something.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: I'll see if I can link it to the device you have with you.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Ouch!

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: That's some tough material...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Move that here...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: There we go! That's some of my finest work, if I do say so myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Thanks for the help!

sections.title: If the quiver has been upgraded before, but not with Ava's assembler

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mind taking a look at this quiver for me?

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Let me see...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Hmm...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Looks like that quiver could be modified further. Come back to me with another device to modify it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mind taking another look at that quiver I showed you before?

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Hmm, interesting... It seems to lack the power you have in your other device there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right. I was wondering if you could help with that?

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: I'll give it a good go!

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Ouch!

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: That's some tough material...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Move that here...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: There we go! That's some of my finest work, if I do say so myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Thanks for the help!

sections.title: If the quiver has already been upgraded with Ava's assembler

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Hmm...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: It seems like that quiver is as good as it's going to get!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

sections.title: Using any other item on Ava

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: I'm not sure what you are trying to do; are you sure you aren't slightly deranged?
